title: feat(glm): set GLM-5.2 priceMultiplier to 0.5
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Sets `glm` (GLM-5.2) `priceMultiplier` 1 → **0.5** — bills at half Fireworks cost as a deliberate subsidy
- Cost block unchanged ($1.4/$0.26/$4.4 per 1M); effective price drops to 0.5× (completion $4.4→$2.2/1M, prompt $1.4→$0.7/1M)
- New multiplier value (rest of registry is 1 or 1.5) — intentional
- Snapshot updated: GLM-only, price-only diff

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: GLM-5.2 gets a subsidy
gist.blurb: We've slashed the price of GLM-5.2 in half. Enjoy subsidized tokens and generate twice as much text for the same amount of pollen.
gist.summary: The price multiplier for the GLM-5.2 model has been reduced from 1.0 to 0.5, effectively cutting its billing cost in half.
gist.impact: Users generating text with GLM-5.2 will now be billed at half the standard Fireworks cost, dropping completion costs from $4.40 to $2.20 per 1M tokens.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot holding a pair of scissors, having just cut a pixelated price tag in half next to a glowing text terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny pair of scissors, having just cut a pixelated price tag in half. A retro computer monitor in the background glows with lime green (#ecf874) text. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
